2603.22862.title: The Evolution of Tool Use in LLM Agents: From Single-Tool Call to Multi-Tool Orchestration
2603.22862.paper_summary: Tool use enables large language models (LLMs) to access external information, invoke software systems, and act in digital environments beyond what can be solved from model parameters alone. Early research mainly studied whether a model could select and execute a correct single tool call. As agent systems evolve, however, the central problem has shifted from isolated invocation to multi-tool orchestration over long trajectories with intermediate state, execution feedback, changing environments, and practical constraints such as safety, cost, and verifiability. We comprehensively review recent progress in multi-tool LLM agents and analyzes the state of the art in this rapidly developing area. First, we unify task formulations and distinguish single-call tool use from long-horizon orchestration. Then, we organize the literature around six core dimensions: inference-time planning and execution, training and trajectory construction, safety and control, efficiency under resource constraints, capability completeness in open environments, and benchmark design and evaluation. We further summarize representative applications in software engineering, enterprise workflows, graphical user interfaces, and mobile systems. Finally, we discuss major challenges and outline future directions for building reliable, scalable, and verifiable multi-tool agents.
2603.22862.paper_summary_zh: 工具使用使大型語言模型（LLMs）能夠訪問外部信息、調用軟件系統，並在數字環境中行動，超越僅從模型參數中能解決的範疇。早期的研究主要探討模型是否能夠選擇並執行正確的單一工具調用。然而，隨著代理系統的發展，核心問題已經從孤立的調用轉變為在長期軌跡上進行多工具協同，涉及中間狀態、執行反饋、變化的環境以及安全、成本和可驗證性等實際限制。我們全面回顧了多工具LLM代理的最新進展，並分析了這一快速發展領域的最新技術。首先，我們統一了任務的表述，並區分了單次調用工具使用和長期協同。然後，我們根據六個核心維度組織文獻：推理時的規劃與執行、訓練與軌跡構建、安全與控制、在資源限制下的效率、開放環境中的能力完整性，以及基準設計與評估。我們進一步總結了在軟件工程、企業工作流程、圖形用戶界面和移動系統中的代表性應用。最後，我們討論了主要挑戰並概述了構建可靠、可擴展和可驗證的多工具代理的未來方向。
2603.22862.author: Haoyuan Xu et.al.
2603.22862.authors: Haoyuan Xu, Chang Li, Xinyan Ma, Xianhao Ou, Zihan Zhang, Tao He, Xiangyu Liu, Zixiang Wang, Jiafeng Liang, Zheng Chu, Runxuan Liu, Rongchuan Mu, Ming Liu, Bing Qin
